name: Key Vault purge protection not enabled
description: Purge protection is not enabled on the Key Vault. Without purge protection, a malicious or mistaken purge of soft-deleted vault objects will permanently destroy encryption keys, secrets, and certificates — causing data loss.
remediation: Enable purge protection: az keyvault update --name <vault> --enable-purge-protection true. Note: purge protection cannot be disabled once enabled. Requires soft delete to be enabled first. This is mandatory for Key Vaults used with Azure Disk Encryption or Managed HSM.
